caption: A person's hand is seen from a first-person perspective, holding a clear plastic card protector over a table covered with a light-colored cloth featuring a tropical pattern of green palm trees and orange accents. On the table sits a stack of white and yellow cardboard boxes. In the corner of the frame, a small inset video shows a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt, seated in a chair. On-screen text and logos appear throughout the scene, including "JASPYS" in red and white, "CASEBREAKS.COM" in white on a red background, and "Jaspys Sports Cards & More" in smaller white text. As the sequence progresses, the person's hand moves the clear protector across the top of the boxes and then shifts slightly to the side, while the man in the inset video remains seated and looks toward the camera.
